heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1831 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter $125,000 for the period beginning , and ending ; and for the fiscal year beginning , and for each fiscal year thereafter there are authorized to be appropriated such sums, not to exceed $500,000, as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.July 1, 1976September 30, 1976October 1, 1976
notes: Amendments1976— substituted provisions authorizing $125,000 to be appropriated for the period beginning and ending , and $500,000 to be appropriated for the fiscal year beginning , and each fiscal year thereafter, to carry out the purposes of this chapter, for provisions authorizing not more than $100,000 to be appropriated annually to carry out the provisions of this chapter.Pub. L. 94–360July 1, 1976September 30, 1976October 1, 1976
Effective Date of 1976 Amendmentprovided that the amendment made by that section is effective .Section 10 of Pub. L. 94–360July 1, 1976
